mapper.select: SELECT id, cancel_date AS cancelDate, show_time AS showTime, reason, actor_name AS actorName, notes FROM sf_angel_show_cancel WHERE YEAR(cancel_date) = #{year} AND MONTH(cancel_date) = #{month} ORDER BY cancel_date DESC, show_time ASC
SELECT id, cancel_date AS cancelDate, show_time AS showTime, reason, actor_name AS actorName, notes FROM sf_angel_show_cancel WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sf_angel_show_cancel (cancel_date, show_time, reason, actor_name, notes) VALUES (#{cancelDate}, #{showTime}, #{reason}, #{actorName}, #{notes})
mapper.update: UPDATE sf_angel_show_cancel SET cancel_date = #{cancelDate}, show_time = #{showTime}, reason = #{reason}, actor_name = #{actorName}, notes = #{notes} WHERE id = #{id}
